untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'Inverted Cup with Handle' chart pattern formation and pattern-specific downside breakout validation. These are visual/morphological patterns that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, and Bar Properties). Pattern recognition requires specialized algorithms or indicator arrays. Additionally, market regime context (BEAR_MARKET vs BULL_MARKET) cannot be precisely mapped to the allowed REGIME values (TRENDING_UP, TRENDING_DOWN, RANGING, HIGH_VOL, ANY).
translation_notes: Approximated entry using ADX > 25 (trend strength indicator) and downside breakout (close < prev_close), with exit on upside reversal. True implementation requires custom pattern recognition logic for Inverted Cup with Handle formations and market regime detection beyond the scope of allowed indicators.
